title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Quikr International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Quikr International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
